title: September 7th, 2021 (2)
body:
- lyrics
    - oh no. i get it
    - about as much as there is to get
    - but every moment of my life is brand new
    - so even if i don't forget to bring it
    - i can't always repack it to fit this package so i can bring it in
    - sometimes i carry on, others i lay over
    - most trips are long enough for me to wake up before i have to stay over
    - sleeping is how i stay sober
    - deep enough i don't know where i am
    - flying when i'm in cuz my mars rover can't go there alone
    - my environment is cold air and burnt ozone
    - you might wanna hold your nose over here
- if i don't love you like this has perfect drop into cosmogenetaestheschism
- twitter tweets
    - privilege is having handicaps in your favor that are determined at an environmental, non-personal scale
    - outside of a white supremacist environment, what advantage is there to being white
    - to the extent that we are privileged we are unable to exist neutrally in shared spaces without peaceful intentions, present attention, community  informed self awareness
        - we all will take up too much space in exactly the ways we are privileged even if we never mean a bit of harm or overreach
        - people who actively weaponize their privilege are dangerous and antisocial in any context
        - antisocial people and societies don't disappear from view. rather they cycle through people before discarding them when useless
        - antisocial people don't just go away and wither without the sustenance of community. they invade, degrade, and dominate existing communities and people
        -
-
